title: ep 24 Core switch
wikitext:
[]: ep. 24' Core switch?             Quote Post by K40s » Sat Jul 20, 2013 11:59 pm I was re-watching the episode and during the scene when they are synch-testing the 3 pilots (around the 7:10 mark) they are all surprised that Kaworu is synchronizing with unit-02 and Kozo says something about Kaworu shouldn't be able to synchronize at all before switching unit-02's core. So are the subs I'm reading poorly translated or the core-switching dates back to NGE and we didn't realized?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sun Jul 21, 2013 12:19 am Here's the ADV/Platinum excerpts: Episode 24 wrote: FUYUTSUKI: Who would have expected that he would synchronize with Unit 02 without the core being reconfigured? This boy...

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jul 21, 2013 4:36 am It's probably a matter of changing the default routines for how the plug interacts with the core, not anything to do with the core itself. Calibrations and selective signal boosting/dampening based on data from all those synch tests they love so much, that sort of thing.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jul 21, 2013 10:11 am Kaworu's ability to synchonize with Eva-02 is actually explained later on in episode #24 Episode #24 wrote: Kaworu: The Eva are made of the same body as I am. Because I am born from Adam as well. I could merge with them, if only they didn't have souls. Unit 02's soul has shut itself away for now.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Sun Jul 21, 2013 2:22 pm This raises the question: how do you "reconfigure" a core? From Touji we get that a core and a child go hand by hand, we know that Eva-01 has been (of camera) "reconfigured" for Rei and reconfigured back for Shinji (again of camera), Kaworu shouldn't synch with Eva-02 which raises all kind of red flags about him, and they mention that they have to "reconfigure/switch" eva-02's core for him. My guess is in NME they showed us the core being actually pulled out when putting precisely Eva-02 in storage was to make clear that all these "reconfigurations" actually involve removing the core that contains the pilot's mother's soul and replace it with another core that contain the new pilot's mother's soul. In NME they had to remove Eva-02's core not really to storage her but to place the core in Eva-03 so Asuka could test drive her. After the Bardiel incident they recovered Asuka's core, and Mari got her own core in Eva-02 when she pulled her Eva-02 vs. Zeruel. In NGE in the cross-synch test between Shinji and Rei they make a point about that it wouldn't work in Asuka's eva. At least Ritsuko knows about the mother-soul-in-core mechanic, and wanted to test how Rei (being a clone of Yui) would react with Yui's soul around in Eva-01 and how Shinji would react with a fragment of Lilith's soul that has lived in (and being imprinted by) Rei's body. Asuka and Kyoko have no relation whatsoever with either Shinji, Rei or Yui so there's no point in cross-testing with her since it would fail.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jul 21, 2013 2:29 pm K40s wrote: In NME they had to remove Eva-02's core not really to storage her but to place the core in Eva-03 so Asuka could test drive her. After the Bardiel incident they recovered Asuka's core, and Mari got her own core in Eva-02 when she pulled her Eva-02 vs. Zeruel.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jul 21, 2013 3:55 pm Rebuild has nothing to do with the series. trying to take evidence from one and apply it to the other is completely wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Jul 21, 2013 4:44 pm NemZ wrote: Rebuild has nothing to do with the series. trying to take evidence from one and apply it to the other is completely wrong.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jul 21, 2013 5:02 pm I actually suspect unit 00 would only work for Rei and Kaworu. Just like the dummy plug might only be compatible with 00 and 01. That NERV would even consider putting Kaworu into 02 should have sounded completely ludicrous to everyone who had any idea how they work, which is likely why Ritsuko immediately deduced he wasn't human.

[]:             Quote Post by Atropos » Sun Jul 21, 2013 5:11 pm ^ Ritsuko was confined at the time. You mean how Misato suspected he wasn't human. But yeah, seems that things with Seed souls can sync with anything, but normal humans can only sync with a single Eva.

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Sun Jul 21, 2013 6:02 pm K40s wrote: This raises the question: how do you "reconfigure" a core?

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Sun Jul 21, 2013 8:23 pm NemZ wrote: I actually suspect unit 00 would only work for Rei and Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by NemZ » Sun Jul 21, 2013 8:55 pm Atropos wrote: ^ Ritsuko was confined at the time. You mean how Misato suspected he wasn't human.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Mon Jul 22, 2013 12:59 am ElMariachi wrote: Unlikely, since Mari's core would be EVA-05's, and it vaporized with the 3rd Angel at the beginning of the movie.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Jul 22, 2013 1:16 am K40s wrote: I don't really think this is the case, previous discussions had lead me to think that a soul is just a soul, be it from a Seed, an Angel, an Eva's resident or a Lilin, they are all souls that originally belonged to a FAR individual or new souls that were born through propagation.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jul 22, 2013 1:26 am Bagheera wrote: if all souls were the same Gendo would have triggered an Impact upon ingesting the Adam embryo

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Jul 22, 2013 5:40 am Monk Ed wrote: That's implying that merely having the property of being "of SoL flesh" or "a SoL body" is sufficient to make a SoL body Impact-ready, when I see no evidence for that. We have only ever seen fully-grown SoL bodies (of some form or another) , with unknown internal mechanisms, cause Impacts.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Mon Jul 22, 2013 1:16 pm Bagheera wrote: That would be why I included examples of exactly that in the part you cut out.

[]:             Quote Post by Bagheera » Mon Jul 22, 2013 2:27 pm Monk Ed wrote: I'm not following.
